nodes.label: Unit tests for AI Doc Chat V2 retriever module.
Test de-duplication when all 4 attributes are present and match.
Test that chunks with missing hash are included.
Test that chunks with missing document name are included.
Test that chunks with missing page number are included.
Test that chunks with missing chunk text are included.
Test that empty chunks list returns empty list.
Test that chunks with missing documentId are included.
Test that first occurrence is kept when duplicates exist.
Test that order is preserved after de-duplication.
Test de-duplication with multiple duplicates of same chunk.
Tests for _chunk_to_chunk_v2 (pageNumber vs sheetNumber from documentType).
EXCEL documentType: response has sheetNumber set, pageNumber null.
PDF (or missing) documentType: response has pageNumber set, sheetNumber null.
Missing documentType: treated as page-based (pageNumber set, sheetNumber null).
Test creating error response with case fields.
Test creating info response with case fields.
Test LLM-NOANS case when LLM returns refusal answer.
Test ERR-LLM-CALL case when LLM completion fails.
Tests to verify all error/info cases return correct status codes and camelCase f
Verify ERR-LLM-CALL returns 500 with camelCase fields.
Verify ERR-WEAV-FETCH returns 500 with camelCase fields.
Verify WEAV-NOCHUNKS returns 200 with camelCase fields.
Verify LLM-NOANS returns 200 with camelCase fields.
Verify ERR-LLM-SETUP HTTPException uses camelCase fields.
Verify ERR-WEAV-SETUP HTTPException uses camelCase fields.
Verify all cases have user descriptions in constants.
Documents belonging to one deal should call IAM with that deal as context.
Documents from different deals should produce one IAM call per deal.
Chunks without a dealId should fall back to organisation scope.
Chunks with and without dealId should produce separate IAM calls.
Duplicate document IDs across calls should be deduplicated.
Empty chunks list should return empty without calling IAM.
